---
title: "Ben Black"
subtitle: "Leiter der Arbeitsgruppe"
image: ben.jpg
image-alt: "Photo of Ben Black"
skills:
  - R
  - Quarto
  - Team Leadership
  - System Design
projects:
  - title: "Cloud Migration Platform"
    url: "/projects/cloud-migration"
  - title: "Microservices Framework"
    url: "/projects/microservices"
  - title: "Developer Portal"
    url: "/projects/dev-portal"
description: "Ben is the head of our working group, responsible for overseeing all projects and ensuring successful delivery. With a strong background in software engineering and team leadership, Ben has been instrumental in driving innovation and fostering a collaborative work environment."
links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:benjaminsamuel.black@zalf.de
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/blenback
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ben-black-9889a1150
    - icon: globe2
      text: Persönliche Website
      href: https://blenback.github.io/
about: 
  template: solana
  image: ben.jpg
  image-alt: "Photo of Ben Black"
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:benjaminsamuel.black@zalf.de
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/blenback
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ben-black-9889a1150
    - icon: globe2
      text: Persönliche Website
      href: https://blenback.github.io/
---

## Education

University of California, San Diego | San Diego, CA
PhD in Mathematics | Sept 2011 - June 2015

Macalester College | St. Paul, MN
B.A in Economics | Sept 2007 - June 2011

## Experience

Wengo Analytics | Head Data Scientist | April 2018 - present

GeoScynce | Chief Analyst | Spet 2012 - April 2018 test
